next_action.instruction: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether activated teleports act only as automatic respawn checkpoints, also permit fast travel among activated teleports, or additionally provide broader services such as healing loadout changes or extraction. Preserve the interconnected authored room map, cleared-room persistence, environmental hazards, automatic teleport cadence of approximately six or seven rooms, checkpoint respawning, future co-op compatibility, and the one-level internal MVP boundary. Include exploration pacing, backtracking, speedrunning, farming or sequence-break risk, UI and save-state complexity, co-op regrouping, short-session convenience, and reuse in later larger missions. Put the recommendation after all A/B/C options at the end of the card. Queue D-171 through D-180 and persist at D-180 unless the user changes the batching rule or requests a context handoff.
